channel.title: Blog on ICCC Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on ICCC Hub

item.title: Time for a New Jersey Design
item.description: The current ICCC jersey has served us well — but it might be time to rethink it for modern cycling. Here’s why, and an open call for ideas.

item.title: The ICCC Website Got a Makeover
item.description: The ICCC website has a new design. A small contribution to making cycling at Imperial a little more stylish — we are in South Kensington, after all.

item.title: New Logos for ICCC
item.description: ICCC has new logos. The old coat of arms had a good run — but a cycling club in 2026 probably shouldn’t look like a medieval guild.

item.title: Which Bike Should You Choose as a Beginner?
item.description: A beginner’s guide to choosing the right bike, covering frame materials, sizes, types, and budget considerations.

item.title: Essential Road Cycling Clothing and Where to Buy
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to essential road cycling clothing, safety gear, and where to purchase them.

item.title: Endurance Training Methods, Recovery and Nutrition
item.description: A comprehensive guide to endurance training, recovery, strength work, and nutrition for cyclists and triathletes.

item.title: Is Bike Fitting Really That Precise?
item.description: Bike fitting myths and practical advice for beginners — how to adjust your saddle, handlebars, and cleats safely.

item.title: Bike Washing, Maintenance & Care
item.description: Practical tips for cleaning, maintaining, and caring for your bike, including chain lubrication and basic repairs.

item.title: Website & Blog Maintenance Guide
item.description: How to maintain the ICCC website and Hugo blog — editing pages, writing posts, testing locally, and deploying via GitHub.

item.title: How to Write a Blog Post for ICCC
item.description: A guide to writing and formatting blog posts for the ICCC Hub — covering Markdown syntax, images, videos, and frontmatter.
